_comment: Default grading rubric for war attacks. Override per-call or via COC_RUBRIC_PATH. Edit freely — all values configurable.

war_attack_rubric._comment: Rules for grading regular war attacks (2 attacks per player).

first_attack._comment: Acceptable target offsets relative to attacker's map position. 0 = mirror, +1 = one down (one weaker), etc.

second_attack._comment: Second attack should be a 'smart 3-star' — typically a base lower than your rank.

cwl_attack_rubric._comment: Rules for grading CWL attacks (1 attack per player per round).

elder_promotion_rubric._comment: Bar for member -> elder promotion. Used by clash_promotion_candidates.

carry_forward_rubric._comment: Bar for keeping a player in the next CWL roster. Used by clash_carry_forward_recommendation.
